_template.name: OpenGRIS: Local Dev Cluster
_template.description: Single-machine Scaler deployment for local development and testing. Runs scheduler, object store, and workers on localhost with native process management.
_template.author: CalmStudio Contributors

nodes.name: Local Dev Cluster
nodes.description: Single-machine OpenGRIS cluster container for local development and testing

nodes.name: Local Scheduler
nodes.description: OpenGRIS Scaler scheduler coordinating task dispatch to local workers

nodes.name: Worker 1
nodes.description: Local compute worker process for task execution

nodes.name: Worker 2
nodes.description: Local compute worker process for task execution

nodes.name: Local Object Store
nodes.description: In-process object storage for task inputs, outputs, and intermediate data

nodes.name: Native Worker Manager
nodes.description: Native process worker manager — spawns worker processes on the local machine

relationships.description: Cluster contains the object storage service
Scheduler reads and writes task data via the object store (ZeroMQ TCP)
Worker 1 receives tasks from and reports results to the scheduler (ZeroMQ TCP)
Worker 2 receives tasks from and reports results to the scheduler (ZeroMQ TCP)
Native worker manager registers with scheduler and spawns local worker processes on demand
